title: task
description: python/src/lichen/interface/meshtastic/translate.py:103-139 and 174-213 - Position.from_bytes() and User.from_bytes() call _decode_varint() which raises TranslationError on truncated/malformed protobuf data. These exceptions propagate to callers like Translator.position_to_announce_payload() which don't catch them. Failure scenario: Receive corrupted or truncated Position protobuf from a Meshtastic device. _decode_varint raises TranslationError('truncated varint'). Exception propagates up and may crash the adapter or drop valid subsequent messages. Fix: Either wrap _decode_varint calls in try/except and return partial result, or document that callers must handle TranslationError.
close_reason: Fixed: Wrapped Position.from_bytes() and User.from_bytes() parsing loops in try/except TranslationError to return partial results on malformed protobuf instead of propagating exceptions. Also added missing bounds checks for fixed32/fixed64 skip operations in User.from_bytes().
